title: Not Enough Rocks (N.E.R)
description: Adds more rocks and rock related features to spice up your world and your builds.
body:
Ever felt like our building pallette was lacking?
Did you ever feel like it was lacking especiffically because it didnt have rocks? No?
Me neither but i like rocks :)

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/082d3d49d1b070a44ecd5c8a8cd21a30f95e594f.png)

> - Included rocks (and building blocks)
1. > Pegmatite,
1. > Colored pegmatite tiles,
1. > Cobbled andesite, granite and diorite,
1. > Andesite, granite and diorite bricks,
1. > Smooth stone tiles,
2. > Permafrost,
3. > Permafrost bricks,
4. > Flintstone

> - Included Items
1. > Copper Chisel 
   (turns blocks into their chiseled forms without the need of crafting)
2. > Copper Hammer
   (turns blocks into their cracked forms)
